sqlMap.select: SELECT survey_id, title, purpose, user_id, create_date, survey_start_date, survey_end_date, user_name1, user_name2, use_status, open_days, result_public_flag, anonymous_flag, multi_answer_flag, participate_flag, delete_user, update_user, update_date, company_id, tenant_id FROM TBL_SURVEY WHERE USER_ID = #userId# order by survey_id asc limit #beginIndex#, #rows#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SURVEY WHERE USER_ID = #userId#
